blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

You have successfully:

- Navigated to the Time intervals page
- Created a time interval with a recurring schedule
- Navigated to Notification policies
- Attached the time interval as a mute timing on a notification policy
- Saved the updated policy configuration

---

### More to explore

Now that you've configured a mute timing, keep in mind:

- Mute timings are configured per policy — they aren't inherited by child policies
- To suppress notifications at multiple levels, attach the mute timing to each policy individually
- [Mute timings documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/configure-notifications/mute-timings/) for the full reference

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this one:

- [Create a silence](/docs/learning-paths/alerting-silence-notification/) for one-time, ad-hoc suppression
- [Edit the default notification policy](/docs/learning-paths/alerting-edit-default-policy/) to control contact points and grouping
